title: 更新 ARCHITECTURE.md Known Limitations
description: Update ARCHITECTURE.md Known Limitations section: (1) Item 4 still says no request queue/retry — update to note M103 is implementing these. (2) Item 5 still says no model_not_found validation — update to note M103 is adding this. (3) Remove items 4-5 once M103 code ships, or update wording to reflect current state. Also fix adapter path labels in architecture diagram: adapters/sense.js → runtime/adapters/sense.js.
